mapper.select: select count(*) from department where companyId = #{companyId}
select coalesce(max(sortOrder), 0) from department where companyId = #{companyId} and (parentId = #{parentId} OR (parentId IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
mapper.insert: insert into department (companyId, parentId, deptNm, deptCd, depth, sortOrder) value (#{companyId}, #{parentId}, #{deptNm}, #{deptCd}, #{depth}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: select count(*) from department where parentId = #{deptId}

with recursive childTree as ( select deptId from department where parentId = #{deptId} union all select d.deptId from department d join childTree c on d.parentId = c.deptId ) select deptId from childTree
